title: Greenfield Resource Pack
description: The official resource pack for Greenfield City, the largest city in Minecraft.
body:
## Welcome to Greenfield!

The Greenfield Resource Pack is a city-building-focused resource pack. It provides a wide assortment of blocks to suit the needs of all sorts of structures and building types required of a modern city. With that in mind, this particular resource pack is designed for the Greenfield City Map - if you haven't heard of Greenfield, we suggest you [check it out](https://www.planetminecraft.com/project/greenfield---new-life-size-city-project/)!

---

### FAQ

Q: **Can I use this for my public (or soon-to-be-released) map?**
A: Yes, if it is a __*completely*__ unedited version of this resource pack.

Q: **Can I use resources from this resource pack in my own work?**
A: Yes if it is a non-publicly distributed work. No, if you intend to release it publicly. If you want to release your work publicly, you must request permission via the instructions provided on the GreenfieldMC conditions page.

Q: **Can I use this in a video?**
A: Yes.

Q: **Can I reupload this resource pack on another website?**
A: No.

Q: **I Found an issue, can I report it?**
A: Yes, report it [here](https://github.com/GreenfieldMC/Greenfield-Texturepack/issues).

---
